overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian futuristic city in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), approaching a damaged megastructure with neon graffiti, walking along an elevated overlook of a destroyed urban construction site, and entering a dark interior lobby with glowing cybernetic decorations.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a massive damaged megastructure from a plaza, tilting down from the building's curved facade to reveal the entrance stairs and glowing cyan neon signage.

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an open overlook, the camera reveals a vast destroyed cityscape with construction cranes and smoking ruins, while an NPC stands at the railing observing the view.

segments.scene_description: Entering the dark interior lobby, the camera approaches a metal security door flanked by glowing cyan neon skeletons, transitioning from natural to artificial neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright urban plaza, ascending toward a panoramic cityscape before descending into a dark, neon-lit interior. It begins by approaching a massive damaged megastructure, tilting down from the curved facade to reveal entrance stairs and glowing cyan signage. As the camera ascends these stairs and moves through an overgrown walkway, the scene opens onto a vast overlook featuring smoking ruins, construction cranes, and distant futuristic skylines. The camera then glides along the curved path past several NPCs before turning back toward the building to descend the stairs. Finally, the movement transitions from the natural light of the exterior into a dark interior lobby, where the view settles on a metal security door flanked by glowing cyan neon skeletons.
